detectedNarratives.title: Trading automation for retail power users
detectedNarratives.whyItMatters: Retail traders increasingly need real-time interpretation of social, wallet, and liquidity signals.

evidence.name: nirholas/three.ws
evidence.description: Open-source 3D AI agent framework — GLB/glTF avatars with LLM brains, memory, emotions, and autonomous payments. MCP server · x402 · Solana/EVM · Three.js. Embed anywhere as a web component. Character studio, animation gallery, OAuth 2.1. Browser-native.

evidence.name: gunjanjaswal/Awesome-Public-Free-Apis
evidence.description: 🌐 Awesome Public APIs: A self-updating collection of free APIs for developers. Automatically discovers and tracks popular APIs across 40+ categories. Features verified endpoints, comprehensive details (auth, CORS, HTTPS), and community contributions. Star to stay updated!

buildIdeas: A safety-first copy-trading rule builder that rejects thin-liquidity or high-tax token routes.
A caller-quality index that scores social accounts using historical token outcomes and wallet flow.
A portfolio sentinel that alerts when a wallet's positions become crowded across overlapping narratives.
